response.justification: Wei Chen is a seasoned generalist with ~15 years of software experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, plus recent exposure to MCP servers and agentic tooling at re:cinq. However, the role demands 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, and his AI/GenAI experience appears limited to roughly one year. There is no demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks, and no evidence of leading customer-facing technical discovery at the scale a staff forward-deployed role requires.
strengths: Recent hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic-workflow infrastructure
Strong polyglot engineering depth (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, C/C++) with production systems at scale
Proven teaching, workshop, and mentoring track record supporting the mentorship aspect of the role
concerns: Falls far short of the required 8+ years building AI-driven solutions (~1 year of relevant AI work)
No stated experience with vector databases, RAG, LLM evaluation, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI
Limited evidence of enterprise customer-facing delivery or leading technical discovery sessions

key_factors.factor: MCP and agentic-tooling exposure at current role
